assertions.title: Budget caps pause future runs

steps.expected: Autopilot settings visible with budget information
steps.observed: Autopilot settings visible. Budget shows 60 minutes/week. No paused state visible when autopilot is running normally.

steps.expected: Budget tab shows pause indicator if budget exceeded
steps.observed: Budget tab shows only '0.00' USD budget input and 'Set budget' button. No pause badge, no pause reason displayed.

steps.action: Check UI code for pause indicator
steps.expected: Pause badge should be visible when autopilot.paused=true or budgetQuery.data?.paused=true
steps.observed: Code in AutopilotSettings.tsx shows pause badge logic exists: '((budgetQuery.data?.paused && budgetQuery.data?.pauseReason) || (autopilot && autopilot.paused))' but it does not appear in the rendered UI during normal operation.

evidence.consoleErrors: WebSocket closed without opened (6 instances) - appears to be a known connection issue, not blocking
evidence.network: All API calls via Convex broker, not standard /api/* routes

assertions.issues: Budget pause state is NOT visibly surfaced in the UI. The backend code has checkBudgetAndPauseIfNeeded but the UI does not display a pause badge when budget is exceeded. Round 3 finding confirmed: 'no Paused state indicator is visible in the Budget tab or Autopilot Settings when autopilot is running normally.' This round 4 test confirms the feature (pause badge display) was NOT completed.

assertions.title: Operator can pause and resume autopilot or a specific run

steps.action: Navigate to Autopilot tab - initial state
steps.observed: 'Pause Autopilot' button visible with 'Enable Product Autopilot' checkbox checked

steps.expected: Button changes to 'Resume Autopilot', indicating paused state
steps.observed: Button immediately changed to 'Resume Autopilot' - pause action confirmed working at UI level

steps.action: Reload page to verify pause state persistence
steps.expected: Autopilot remains paused, 'Resume Autopilot' button visible
steps.observed: Page reloaded to autopilot tab URL '/TES/projects/autopilot-test-project?tab=...'. 'Pause Autopilot' button visible again - paused state NOT persisted across reload

steps.action: Click 'Pause Autopilot' again, then click 'Resume Autopilot'
steps.expected: Resume restores running state, button changes back to 'Pause Autopilot'
steps.observed: Clicked Pause, then clicked Resume button, but UI still showed 'Resume Autopilot' button - resume action does not properly transition UI back to running state

steps.action: Wait and re-snapshot after resume click
steps.observed: After 5 second wait, snapshot still shows 'Resume Autopilot' button - resume action appears to fail silently

evidence.network: Pause/Resume via plugin SDK action system (not REST API)

assertions.issues: Two issues found: (1) Pause state does NOT persist across page reload - clicking Pause then reloading shows 'Pause Autopilot' button again instead of 'Resume Autopilot'. (2) Resume action does NOT properly transition UI back to running state - clicking Resume leaves UI stuck showing 'Resume Autopilot' button. The pauseAutopilot and resumeAutopilot actions need backend implementation fixes.

frictions.description: Pause state reverts on page reload - backend persistence issue
Resume action fails to transition UI back to running state
No budget pause badge visible in Budget tab or Autopilot Settings when autopilot is paused due to budget
WebSocket connection errors (6 instances) - likely related to Convex broker setup, non-blocking

summary: Tested 2 assertions: VAL-AUTOPILOT-033 failed (no budget pause indicator visible), VAL-AUTOPILOT-034 failed (pause state does not persist on reload, resume action fails to restore running state). Both assertions remain broken from round 3 - no fixes applied in this iteration.
